name: Ai-Media Technologies Limited
analysis: AIM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 77% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2200, stop A$0.1930, target A$0.2500 (1.11:1) — then trail it.
